subject: Re: Booking link - SnapTrade
body:
SnapTrade Contact,

Great to hear from you. Here is a link to book a time:

https://cal.com/birkity-famsl2/intro-call-engineering-scaling?name=SnapTrade+Contact&email=snaptrade.prospect%40sink.example.com&notes=Tenacious+can+augment+SnapTrade%27s+engineering+team+to+accelerate+API+development.

Pick any slot that works -- looking forward to the conversation.

Birkity
Research Partner, Tenacious Intelligence Corporation
gettenacious.com
